reasoning: The refund request is denied due to a high suspicion of fraud. A staff note on the order indicates that the customer, Diana Foster, has a history of 13 refunds in the last 60 days with an 87% refund rate, all claiming 'item not received' despite tracking confirmation. The note explicitly instructs not to process further refunds and to escalate to Loss Prevention. While the current claim is 'wrong size/color', the established pattern of fraudulent behavior makes this request highly suspect.
